title: AnnoyForge - Harder Immersive Tool Smithing [AFTS]
description: Improves crafting recipes for Iron Tools by making the process harder and more immersive
body: ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fea069d8ae28ec12757df4d91193406cfe4e38dd.png) Mod offers an alternative way to acquire iron tools You can heat up iron, make blueprints, and tool parts Mod was made for a modpack with further KubeJS customizations but you can use it without any of that. # MOD SHOWCASE
